headline: JPMorgan Raises its Price Target on Analog Devices (ADI)
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is one of the 10 Best American Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade. On May 26, 2026, JPMorgan raised the firm’s price target on Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) to $450 from $400 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. JPMorgan said the company reported a “strong beat-and-raise” […]

headline: Buy 4 Drone Technology Stocks to Enhance Your Portfolio Returns
summary: Four drone-technology stocks, including ESLT, ADI, HEI and TDY, offer exposure to defense, AI and aerospace trends that could lift portfolio returns in 2026.
